# Apache ECharts Vendor Asset

This directory stores the local dashboard runtime for `./scribe dashboard`.

- File: `echarts.min.js`
- Version: `5.5.1`
- Source package: `echarts`
- License: Apache-2.0

The dashboard generator inlines this file into `scribe-out/scribe-dashboard.html`
so the generated report remains static and does not depend on a CDN or server.
